creator: bryan@shatow.net
text:
Perhaps games/daimonin-music should not be a port but games/daimonin
should just fetch the updated music occasionally into its datadir?

A script could be made for games/daimonin to achieve this and the user
could crontab it if they wanted.

games/daimonin could then rmdir the music dir in its plist as well.

Other ports do similar things, such as clamav updating its database.

My only desire is to remove NO_CHECKSUM from all ports.

Regards,
Bryan
